title: Hephaestus Beliefs Workspace Schema
description: Schema for beliefs.yaml — the capacity-limited workspace of consolidated beliefs. Only the Reflector writes beliefs. Every belief must have a falsifiable kill_criterion.

schema_version.description: Schema version number. Bump when making backward-incompatible changes.

beliefs.description: List of consolidated beliefs. Capacity-limited (max 128 entries).

statement.description: The belief statement — a falsifiable claim about the codebase or process.

kill_criterion.description: Falsifiable condition that would invalidate this belief. Mandatory — beliefs without kill_criterion are invalid.

confidence.description: Confidence level based on evidence strength.

stagnation.description: Number of ticks since this belief last produced a positive outcome. Monotonically increasing while dormant.

momentum.description: Momentum score for this belief. Positive = reinforcing evidence accumulating. Negative = erosion. Zero = neutral.

ttl.description: Time-to-live in ticks. When TTL expires, belief is eligible for eviction review.

cooldown_remaining.description: Ticks remaining in cooldown after a frame shift or ratchet direction change. Zero = not in cooldown.

provenance.description: Provenance trail — records of what evidence/channels created or modified this belief.

source.description: Source of the provenance record: channel name (reflector, analogy, replay, dream, whisper, calibration, experiment) or external reference.

hypothesis_id.description: Hypothesis ID that generated the evidence, if applicable.

run_id.description: Run ID that produced the evidence, if applicable.

summary.description: Brief description of what evidence contributed.

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence ledger records supporting this belief.

record_id.description: Evidence record ID from the ledger.

type.description: Evidence type: source, test_output, diff, metric, or ledger_record.

summary.description: Brief description of what this evidence shows.

eviction_strategy.description: Strategy for eviction when capacity is reached.

narrative.description: One-page bounded causal summary. Rewritten (never append-only) by the Reflector each consolidation cycle. Ledger remains the source of truth.
